concepts.role: Defines the target state and goal-relative progress signal.
openQuestions: Exact source-backed goal geometry, token mapping, and over-goal behavior remain unreviewed.
Goal semantics are component-level only and not yet reviewed as a stable system rule.

concepts.role: Represents measured or remembered user action as completed behavior evidence.
openQuestions: Full Workouts section behavior is not source-reviewed.
Future behavior metadata such as route, activity type, and sync state remains unresolved.

concepts.role: Preserves evidence that a behavior happened, including title and record metadata.
openQuestions: Record interaction rules are drafted but not source-reviewed.
Relationship to internal metric substructure remains a future boundary question.

concepts.role: Explains direction and interpretation over time from repeated records.
openQuestions: TrendCard is not composed into SummaryDashboard.
Exact source trend copy, state model, chart need, and data confidence rules remain unreviewed.

concepts.role: Makes sustained behavior visible as reward evidence or achievement marker.
openQuestions: AwardBadge is not composed into SummaryDashboard.
Exact source award title, icon meaning, unlock condition, date, and status remain unreviewed.

supportingConcepts.role: Provides compact current metric context without owning record, trend, or reward semantics.
openQuestions: Source typography, spacing, and color values are not confirmed.
MetricCard remains a supporting component rather than the primary owner of the concept loop.

notes: Concept coverage is semantic and component-level only. This matrix does not promote any component, pattern, token, or visual system.
